results.description: Rep. Thomas Massie (R-Ky.) has lost his primary race after making himself unpopular in the GOP for blocking Trump administration...

results.title: Iowa EMT sues UnityPoint, alleging sexual harassment and retaliation
results.description: An EMT who worked for UnityPoint Health is suing the company, alleging she was the victim of workplace sexual harassment and sexual assault.

results.title: Clay Fuller wins Republican nomination for U.S. House in Georgia’s 14th Congressional District
results.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Clay Fuller wins Republican nomination for U.S. House in Georgia’s 14th Congressional District.

results.title: Pentagon reduces European brigades but says it maintains 'strong' presence in Poland
results.description: Poland said it is prepared to host U.S. troops withdrawn from Germany, opening the door to a possible reshuffling of U.S. forces in Europe.
